name: Blueberry Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and crush 1 cup of the blueberries, reserving the remaining berries.
2. Blend together 1/2 cup sugar and cornstarch in a separate bowl.
3. Add the crushed berries and water to the sugar and cornstarch mixture, stirring constantly until thickened and bubbly.
4. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice and reserved whole blueberries.
5. Pour filling into prepared pie shell.
6. Beat egg whites with 1/4 cup sugar until foamy. Add more sugar, a tablespoon at a time, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
7. Spread meringue over the hot filling, pressing against the inner edge of the crust to seal.
8. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes or until the meringue is lightly golden brown.
9. Cool before serving.
